# service/coffee/types

> **Service Layer**

Core domain types and schemas for the coffee catalog.

## Remarks

This module defines the single source of truth for the [Coffee](type-aliases/Coffee.md)
entity shape via an Effect [Schema.Struct](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/).  The
[CoffeeSchema](variables/CoffeeSchema.md) drives both runtime validation and JSON Schema
generation (through `toStandardSchema` in the MCP tool layer),
while the [Coffee](type-aliases/Coffee.md) type alias provides compile-time safety
throughout the domain, service, and repository layers.

## Variables

| Variable                                  | Description                                                                                               |
| ----------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [CoffeeSchema](variables/CoffeeSchema.md) | Effect [Schema.Struct](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) defining the shape of a coffee catalog entry. |

## Type Aliases

| Type Alias                       | Description                                         |
| -------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| [Coffee](type-aliases/Coffee.md) | Represents a coffee drink available in the catalog. |
